name: Graham Holdings Co
summary: Graham Holdings Company is a diversified holding company with operations spanning educational services (via Kaplan, Inc.), television broadcasting (seven stations), healthcare (specialty pharmacy, home health, hospice, applied behavior analysis, allergy/asthma physician services, aesthetics, and SaaS), manufacturing (commercial building products, electrical solutions, lifting solutions, utility parts), automotive dealerships (eight dealerships), restaurants, custom framing, marketing solutions, media publications including Slate and Foreign Policy magazines, and podcast/audio monetization platforms.
